name: Barbecued Cornish Hen
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush each Cornish hen with melted butter and place on a vertical roaster.
2. In a bowl, mash the garlic and salt together.
3. Combine the mashed garlic and salt with the remaining ingredients for the barbecue sauce.
4. Set the Cornish hens upright on the grill over the coals.
5. Cover the barbecue grill and brush the hens with the sauce every 10 minutes for about 45 minutes, or until they are tender.
